title: Compliance: firmware/bridge-stm32wl/src/iv.rs polling
description: Policy: No-polling. Status: CHECK NEEDED. Has RFBUSY polling. Verify if SUBGHZ_IRQn interrupt is used for RX, or if polling (iu1q).
close_reason: Fixed: wait_on_busy() spin loop now yields with Timer::after_micros(10).await; RX uses interrupt-driven await_irq()
